title: Opening for Software Engineer at iCliniq

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at iCliniq
jsonLd.description:
iCliniq invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Software Engineer at our Allahabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About iCliniq:
iCliniq is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iCliniq!
